title: rosa × centifolia var. carnea
intro: Rosa × centifolia var. carnea, also known as the double pink carnation, is a fragrant and ornamental flower plant that belongs to the rose family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Rosa × centifolia var. carnea include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting relaxation, and soothing digestive issues. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to make perfumes, potpourri, and other fragrant products.
